---
title: "modelling 2.0"
output: html_document
---


```{r}
library(here)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
```
working on the raw egg size measurements for each individual egg


```{r}
raw_egg_sizes <- read.csv(here("data", "clean data", "raw egg sizes.csv"))

raw_egg_sizes <- raw_egg_sizes %>%
  mutate(maternalID = sub("^[^.]*\\.[^.]*\\.([^_]+)_.*$", "\\1", adultID))

#make maternal ID a factor
raw_egg_sizes$maternalID <- as.factor(raw_egg_sizes$maternalID)

#convert the pupal temperatures to factors so they plot in the correct order
raw_egg_sizes$pupal_treatment <- factor(raw_egg_sizes$pupal_treatment,
                             levels = c("wild", "ambient", "cool", "mean", "warm", "hot"))

#convert the larval  temperatures to factors so the plot in the correct order
raw_egg_sizes$larval_treatment <- factor(raw_egg_sizes$larval_treatment,
                             levels = c("wild", "ambient", "cool", "mean", "warm", "hot"))



#looking just at ambient larval temperature.
egg_sizes_ambient_larval <- raw_egg_sizes %>%
  filter(larval_treatment == "ambient") %>%
  mutate(numerical_pupal_treatment = case_when(
    pupal_treatment == "cool"  ~ -1.5,
    pupal_treatment == "mean"  ~  0.0,
    pupal_treatment == "warm"  ~  1.5,
    pupal_treatment == "hot"   ~  2.5,
    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  )) %>%
  mutate(numerical_larval_treatment = case_when(
    larval_treatment == "warm"  ~  1.5,
    larval_treatment == "hot"   ~  2.5,
    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  )) %>%
  mutate(weight_mg = weight * 1000) %>%
  mutate(weight_mg_centered = weight_mg - mean(weight_mg, na.rm = TRUE))


egg_sizes_ambient_larval <- egg_sizes_ambient_larval %>%
  mutate(
    larval_treatment = factor(larval_treatment, levels = c("ambient")))
```

```{r}
#look at the distributions of egg size
ggplot(raw_egg_sizes_filtered, aes(x = area)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.01) +  # change this value to control bin width +
  labs(title = "Distribution of Egg Sizes",
       x = "Egg Area",
       y = "Count") +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r}

lm1 <- lm(area ~ pupal_treatment, data = egg_sizes_ambient_larval)
summary(lm1)
AIC(lm1)
#pupal treatment does affect egg size, compared to ambient

lm2 <- lm(area ~ pupal_treatment + weight_mg_centered, data = egg_sizes_ambient_larval)
summary(lm2)
AIC(lm2)
#so weight does not affect egg size - remove from model

lm3 <- lmer(area ~ pupal_treatment + (1|clutch_ID), data = egg_sizes_ambient_larval )
summary(lm3)
AIC(lm3)
#this is alower AIC so including clutch_ID makes the model better

lm4 <- lmer(area ~ pupal_treatment + (1|clutch_ID) + (1|maternalID), data = egg_sizes_ambient_larval )
summary(lm4)
AIC(lm4)

confint(lm4)
#this has a lower AIC again so including maternalID as a random effect makes the model better.
```

```{r}
library(emmeans)

#estimates marginal means for the pupal treatments, using lm6
emm <- emmeans(lm4, ~ pupal_treatment)
emm

#pairwise comparisons
pairs(emm)

#significant difference between ambient-mean, ambient-warm, and ambient-hot.
```
WARM AND HOT LARVAL TREATMENT

```{r}
#looking just at ambient larval temperature.
egg_sizes_warmhot_larval <- raw_egg_sizes %>%
  filter(larval_treatment %in% c("warm", "hot")) %>%
  mutate(weight_mg = weight * 1000) %>%
  mutate(weight_mg_centered = weight_mg - mean(weight_mg, na.rm = TRUE))


egg_sizes_warmhot_larval <- egg_sizes_warmhot_larval %>%
  mutate(
    larval_treatment = factor(larval_treatment, levels = c("warm", "hot")))
```

```{r}

lm1 <- lm(area ~larval_treatment, data = egg_sizes_warmhot_larval )
summary(lm1)
AIC(lm1)
#larval treatment not significant

lm2 <- lm(area ~ pupal_treatment, data = egg_sizes_warmhot_larval )
summary(lm2)
AIC(lm2)
#pupal treatment significant

lm3 <- lmer(area ~ pupal_treatment + (1|clutch_ID) + (1|maternalID), data = egg_sizes_warmhot_larval )
summary(lm3)
AIC(lm3)


```
```{r}
#estimates marginal means for the pupal treatments, using lm6
emm <- emmeans(lm3, ~ pupal_treatment)
emm

#pairwise comparisons
pairs(emm)

#significant difference between ambient-mean, ambient-warm, and ambient-hot.
```
